creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I have updated this port to a newer version today (before getting 
this report) and wonder whether you are still seeing the issue? 

Yours is the first and only report of this kind, so I believe there 
may be something quite specific to your setup. 

Those parts of the log that you provided do not show any problem. 
If this still happens, can you please provide the full log (via 
private mail may be better) and the contents of config.log in 
/usr/ports/lang/gcc45/work/build ?
